place: Nusa Dua, South Kuta, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
title: Five-Bedroom Clifftop Villa with Ocean Views - Nusa Dua
note: Full staff · private chef · beach club access
blurb: A five-bedroom clifftop villa southwest of Nusa Dua, set within a private estate above the water with jaw-dropping ocean views — semi-open living and dining, a large pool, an air-conditioned home theatre, a private gym, spa and sauna, and a games room and bar, with a resident team and beach access, sleeping up to ten.
detail:
Set within a private estate on the cliffs a few kilometres southwest of Nusa Dua, this five-bedroom villa trades on one thing above all: the ocean, spread wide below from almost every vantage point. Five en-suite bedrooms sleep up to ten, with semi-open-air living and dining areas that keep the sea breeze moving through the house.

The villa is well equipped for staying put: a large swimming pool along the cliff edge, an air-conditioned home theatre, a private gym, a spa and sauna, and a sophisticated games room and bar. The estate setting adds a layer of service and facilities on top of the villa's own, including access down to the beach and beach club below.

A resident team — private chef, butler and concierge — handles the day-to-day, leaving the long lunches, sunset swims and clifftop evenings to you. The restaurants and resorts of Nusa Dua and the Bukit's surf breaks are a short drive away.

features.l: Clifftop pool with jaw-dropping ocean views
